title: PRC-JRN FIELD EXT-001 Intake Schema
purpose: Capture the first authentic external participant artifact without synthetic substitution or facilitator contamination.
invariants: EXT-001 is reserved for the first authentic participant payload.
Synthetic validation artifacts may not occupy EXT-001.
Raw participant output must be preserved before synthesis.
Facilitator notes must remain segregated from raw participant text.
Receipt authority remains false; validation records observation, not truth authority.

case_id.description: Assigned PRC-JRN case identifier completed by participant.

captured_at.description: UTC timestamp of raw artifact capture.

raw_payload.description: Unedited participant output exactly as received.

raw_payload_sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of raw_payload bytes using UTF-8 normalization rules declared by runtime.

facilitator_notes_ref.description: Pointer to segregated facilitator notes, if any. Must not be merged into raw_payload.

append_only_freeze_ref.description: Immutable file, CID, commit, EAS UID, or ERC-1155 metadata pointer containing frozen raw artifact.

public_ledger_pointer.description: Optional public index, EAS, ERC-1155, Git commit, IPFS, or other receipt pointer.
